title: centaurea bracteata
intro: Centaurea bracteata, also known as the prickly centaury or purple fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea bracteata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers. Centaurea bracteata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
